property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
21:31:17.089 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.projetoFacul.ProjetoFaculApplicationTests]: ProjetoFaculApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:31:17.176 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.projetoFacul.ProjetoFaculApplication for test class com.example.projetoFacul.ProjetoFaculApplicationTests 21:31:17.295 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
